message:
fix: handle new LLM event kinds in EventLine switch and groupEvents filter

Add llm_start, llm_chunk, llm_end to the exhaustive switch in EventLine.tsx
(return null since they're internal/invisible) and to INVISIBLE_KINDS in
groupEvents.ts. Remove unused AgentStats type import in useAgentStats.test.ts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -185,6 +185,9 @@ export function EventLine({ event, durationMs, streamingText, isFirstInGroup, ag
 		case "learn_signal":
 		case "learn_end":
 		case "log":
+		case "llm_start":
+		case "llm_chunk":
+		case "llm_end":
 			return null;
 
 		default:
